notes: AZ uses 'Standard → Strand → Concept → Indicator'. Map Standard → domain, Strand → strand, Concept → sub_strand, Indicator (the learning-goal sentence, NOT the lettered 'a./b./c.' examples beneath it) → indicator. No age-band columns.

doc_depths.example: The child demonstrates an awareness of self.

elements.title: Social Emotional Standard
elements.description: Established social-emotional skills have a significant, positive impact on a child’s learning, particularly in cognitive development. It sets the foundation for life-long success. This Standard articulates the ways in which a child can demonstrate their understanding of themselves and others, form positive social relationships, and relate to the world at large. Well-developed, strong, social emotional skills are critical when a child encounters a stressful life challenge. These hardships may include neglect, trauma, poverty, cultural and language differences, bias, and disabilities.

elements.title: The child demonstrates an awareness of self.
elements.description: Children develop a sense of personal identity as they begin to recognize the characteristics that make them unique as individuals and to build self-esteem.

regression_cases.description: Lettered ('a.', 'b.', 'c.') items beneath an indicator are examples, NOT separate indicators.
regression_cases.assertion: no detected indicator's source_text matches r'^\s*[a-z]\.\s' (single lowercase letter followed by '. ').

regression_cases.description: Section headers like 'Indicators and Examples in the Context of Daily Routines, Activities, and Play' must not be emitted as structural elements.
regression_cases.assertion: no detected element has title containing 'Indicators and Examples in the Context'.
the set of distinct levels in the detected output equals {'domain','strand','sub_strand','indicator'}.
